corrected_benchmark: Cross-encoder scored against REAL mic recordings (not Demucs-processed clips)

baseline_real_vs_real.description: Two real mic recordings of Chris (same session)

baseline_real_vs_different_session.description: Real mic recording vs source video (different mic/room/session)

interpretation.clone_vs_real_same_session: 0.870 - Clone scores higher than a different recording of the same speaker (0.718)

comparison_to_published.note: Published academic numbers are single-shot zero-shot on LibriSpeech. ClipCannon uses personalized pipeline with ICL + best-of-N.
